violations.text: Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label (200 - 300 ppm). Water was added to the sanitizer bay and reached proper concentration. Service call placed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Both the handsink and the dishwasher located in the warewashing area are not in good repair and are not currently being used. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dispenser units near the drive thru have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. These areas must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

Upper/lower reach-in at the counter was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. No foods observed in this unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Temperature setting was adjusted during inspection, but temperature did not reach 41 degrees F. Service call is to be placed. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

Lock mechanism (inside handle) of the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. Tape observed over the lock. Maintenance on-site to correct this issue. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and some equipment at the drive-thru area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact areas must remain clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
